---
title: Enfants Pailleron
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779790359/enfants_pailleron_zb6wr7.png
description: Petite fille des enfants Pailleron, Sargent
categories: [fanart]
date: 2025-11-18
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779790359/enfants_pailleron_zb6wr7.png)
